basic_details.job_title: IDS Jaipur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Driver, Junior Office Assistant & Class IV Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Institute of Development Studies Jaipur (IDS Jaipur)
basic_details.post_name: Driver, Junior Office Assistant & Class IV
basic_details.short_information: The Institute of Development Studies Jaipur (IDS Jaipur) Junior Office Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website IDS Jaipur. A total of 03 vacancy has been announced through the IDS Jaipur Driver, Junior Office Assistant & Class IV Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum age 18 years, Maximum age 40 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of Rajasthan norms.

qualification.details: Junior Office Assistant: Senior Secondary from a recognized Board or its equivalent examination. Driver: Secondary (10th) pass from a recognized Board or its equivalent examination. Class IV: Secondary (10th) pass from a recognized Board or equivalent examination

salary_details.details: Pay Band Rs.5200-20200 with Grade Pay Rs.2400 (Partial Implementation of 7th CPC – 55%)

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://www.idsj.org.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Office Assistant post at IDS Jaipur?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Junior Office Assistant position at the Institute of Development Studies Jaipur is 30th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Office Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Senior Secondary from a recognized Board or its equivalent examination to be eligible for the Junior Office Assistant post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Office Assistant position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Junior Office Assistant post is between 18 to 40 years, with relaxation applicable as per Government of Rajasthan norms.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Junior Office Assistant vacancy?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline. You need to download the application form from the official website, fill it, and send it via Speed/Registered Post to the Director, Institute of Development Studies, Jaipur.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Office Assistant post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Junior Office Assistant post is in the Pay Band of Rs.5200-20200 with a Grade Pay of Rs.2400, with partial implementation of the 7th CPC.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Office Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is Three vacancy available for the Junior Office Assistant, Driver, Class IV post at the Institute of Development Studies Jaipur.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Applications must be sent via post.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any experience required for the Junior Office Assistant position?
faq.answer: Yes, experience in working with a Research Institute/organization is required. Proficiency in MS Office and typing skills in English and Hindi are also necessary.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Junior Office Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a written test and/or a personal interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Institute of Development Studies Jaipur, which is http://www.idsj.org.
